TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Pu-cya-le-s-te, title = Pu-cya-le-s-te, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Pu-cya-le-s-te} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pu-cya-le-s-te "Low-ma-ni-ya a kamu Bucure»ôti, Low-ma-ni-ya pangiha a kamu (buku're Ét ≤) )nu Low-ma ni-ya a angangan a tukay, u satabakiay a tukay nu Low-ma ni-ya aca, cen-ce, keyzay angangan nu lalangawan, tini i Low-ma-ni-ya sawali nutimulan, Wa-la-ci-ya enal nu teban, Tu-naw-he saciliw a sa'wac Ten-pow-wi-ca a sa'wac. singangan tu "adidi'ay a Pa-li". ahebal nu hekal 228 kalalecad kung-li, macapi tu 200 emang ku tademaw. anu tademaw ku asipen, Pu-cya-le-s-te nu Ow-mung nu sakaenem nu tabakiay a tukay. :Bucure»ôti,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚįľšļěŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(buku're Ét ≤) ) . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Pu-cya-le-s-te iza 500 tatu a mihcaan ku naemekan. 1459 a mihcaan Pu-cya-le-s-te mala angangan nu Low-ma-ni-ya, 1574 a mihcaan malahad mala angangan nu tukay, 1659 a mihcaan malingatu mala angangan tu nu Wa-la-ci-ya a kanatal. 1862 a mihcaan mala pulung nu Low-ma-ni-ya binawlad pulunngan a kanatal.1877 a mihca 5 a bulad 9 a demiad Low-ma-ni-ya musakamu misateked. 1947 a mihcaan Low-ma-ni-ya binawlad nu kapulungan a kanatal angangan nu tukay. 1960 a mihcaan, syakay anizateng nu kanatal a kung-can-tang atu kuli a sakaput palacapu tu Pu-cya-le-s-te a matatengil. 1977 a mihcaan maninel. 1989 a mihcaan masasuayaw, mala nu baluhay angangan a tukay nu Low-ma-ni-ya. zikuz, malahad tu ku keyzay, mala tungusay nu tukay nu Low-ma-ni-ya. uyni tukay a kakenis mala enem a kitizaan, patizeng tu cacay kinciw, kasa kitizaan cacay ku kinciw, u binawlan ku misingkiway. Pu-cya-le-s-te tusa ku singannganay nu mitukuday tu mali a sakaput- Pu-cya-le-s-te-Ti-na-muw atu Pu-cya-le-s-te-sin a sakaput. tini i Pu-cya-le-s-te a Low-ma-ni-ya nu binawlanay kung-haw kitakt nu saka tusa satabakiay a nisanga'an. duduc 2002 za mihcaan tu nikinsaay tu tademaw, Pu-cya-le-s-te iza ku 1,926334 ku tademaw, macalap ku labuay nu Low-ma-ni-ya a tademaw 8.9% . katuud ku i Pu-cya-le-s-te mikawaway a tademaw muneng i Pu-cya-le-s-te micapi tu tukay "angangan i I-al-bu-a kuwan", nika caay ka ilabuen miasip ku tademaw nuheni. Pu-cya-le-s-te a tademaw micaliway tu tusa a kadadawa nu kacunusay a ziday. saayaway I 19 a se-ci tu sazikuzay a mihcaan katukuh tu sakatusa nu kitakit a nganganyaw. sakatusa i Ci-aw-say-s-ku a ziday "1965-1989", kilul tu kacakat nu tukay, katuud ku malukay nu niyazu' mabulaw tayza i tukay. namahini, i Ci-aw-say-s-ku la'tus amipatay tu nisabilian atu sapipatut sibili a sapayu, pakiniza han talakaw ku nikacunus. Pu-cya-le-s-te a tademawan, 96.9% sa nu Low-ma-ni-ya a tademaw. sakatusa binacadan a tademaw sa u Low-mu a tademaw, macalap ku 1.4% nu tademaw. zuma a binacadan izaw ku Swng-ya-li a tademaw "0.3%"Yu-tay a tademaw "0.1%", Tu-al-ci a tademaw "0.1%", Cong-kow aa tademaw "0.1%" atu Te-kow a tademaw "0.1%". Pu-cya-le-s-te nu Low-ma-ni-ya a kezay atu angangaan nu kusi. 210 a nihcaan, kanatal a nisanga'an pulunng nu aca macalap ku Low-ma-ni-ya hami nu kanatal 22.7 %, kusi a nisanga'an macalap ku hamin nu kanati tu sepat a hunt u cacay. u tademaw hamin nu kannatal 9% dada' ku nikacalap. Low-ma-ni-ya iza ku tulu hunt u cacay ku niala tu sata makayzaay i Pu-cya-le-s-te nu binawlanay atu kapulung a kusi. . 2007 a nihcaan, kilul miasip tu micakayay, Pu-cya-le-s-te a tademaw palalecad Kanata a nisanga'an pulung nu aca 20,057 ku Ow a kalisiw, mahiza nu Ow-cow palaleca tu kakatukuh 92.2%, nu Low-ma-ni-ya palalecad tu kakatukuh pikakaan tu tusa. i kalalecad kasatezep tu 1990 a mihcaan tu zikuz, Pu-cya-le-s-te icelang ku nikacakat nu kezay, sakauzip a nisanga'an kalamkam sa malahad, saaca yadah ku nipatizang tu picakayan, luma' atu talakaway a satungduh nu lama' a pikawawan. 2007ŚĻī, == malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ==
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô "r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja a kamu bu ¶ur…ô*ti, r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja paŇčińßa a kamu (buku Ē~ °r…ô*t*) )nu r~…ĺow-ma ni-ja a aŇčaŇčan a tukaj, u satabakiaj a tukaj nu r~…ĺow-ma ni-ja a ¶a, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, k…ôzaj aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan, tini i r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja sawar~…ĺi nutimur~…ĺan, wa-r~…ĺa- ¶i-ja …ônar~…ĺ nu t…ôban, tu-naw-ńß…ô sa ¶ir~…ĺiw a sa Ē~ °wa ¶ t…ôn-pow-wi- ¶a a sa Ē~ °wa ¶. siŇčaŇčan tu "adidi Ē~ °aj a pa-r~…ĺi". ańß…ôbar~…ĺ nu ńß…ôkar~…ĺ *** kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kuŇč-r~…ĺi, ma ¶api tu *** …ômaŇč ku tad…ômaw. anu tad…ômaw ku asip…ôn, pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô nu ow-muŇč nu saka…ôn…ôm nu tabakiaj a tukaj. :bu ¶ur…ô*ti,*******:(buku Ē~ °r…ô*t*) ) . r~…ĺikisi** pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô iza *** tatu a mińß ¶aan ku na…ôm…ôkan. **** a mińß ¶aan pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja, **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺańßad mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj, **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu mar~…ĺa aŇčaŇčan tu nu wa-r~…ĺa- ¶i-ja a kanatar~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺa pur~…ĺuŇč nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja binawr~…ĺad pur~…ĺunŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ.**** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja musakamu misat…ôk…ôd. **** a mińß ¶aan r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja binawr~…ĺad nu kapur~…ĺuŇčan a kanatar~…ĺ aŇčaŇčan nu tukaj. **** a mińß ¶aan, sjakaj anizat…ôŇč nu kanatar~…ĺ a kuŇč- ¶an-taŇč atu kur~…ĺi a sakaput par~…ĺa ¶apu tu pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a matat…ôŇčir~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan manin…ôr~…ĺ. **** a mińß ¶aan masasuajaw, mar~…ĺa nu bar~…ĺuńßaj aŇčaŇčan a tukaj nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja. zikuz, mar~…ĺańßad tu ku k…ôzaj, mar~…ĺa tuŇčusaj nu tukaj nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja. ujni tukaj a kak…ônis mar~…ĺa …ôn…ôm a kitizaan, patiz…ôŇč tu ¶a ¶aj kin ¶iw, kasa kitizaan ¶a ¶aj ku kin ¶iw, u binawr~…ĺan ku misiŇčkiwaj. pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô tusa ku siŇčanŇčanaj nu mitukudaj tu mar~…ĺi a sakaput- pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô-ti-na-muw atu pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô-sin a sakaput. tini i pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja nu binawr~…ĺanaj kuŇč-ńßaw kitakt nu saka tusa satabakiaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an. dudu ¶ **** za mińß ¶aan tu nikinsaaj tu tad…ômaw, pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô iza ku *,****** ku tad…ômaw, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku r~…ĺabuaj nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja a tad…ômaw *.*% . katuud ku i pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô mikawawaj a tad…ômaw mun…ôŇč i pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô mi ¶api tu tukaj "aŇčaŇčan i i-ar~…ĺ-bu-a kuwan", nika ¶aaj ka ir~…ĺabu…ôn miasip ku tad…ômaw nuńß…ôni. pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a tad…ômaw mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu tusa a kadadawa nu ka ¶unusaj a zidaj. saajawaj i ** a s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu sakatusa nu kitakit a ŇčaŇčanjaw. sakatusa i ¶i-aw-saj-s-ku a zidaj "****-****", kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ka ¶akat nu tukaj, katuud ku mar~…ĺukaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° mabur~…ĺaw tajza i tukaj. namańßini, i ¶i-aw-saj-s-ku r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus amipataj tu nisabir~…ĺian atu sapipatut sibir~…ĺi a sapaju, pakiniza ńßan tar~…ĺakaw ku nika ¶unus. pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a tad…ômawan, **.*% sa nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja a tad…ômaw. sakatusa bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw sa u r~…ĺow-mu a tad…ômaw, ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku *.*% nu tad…ômaw. zuma a bina ¶adan izaw ku swŇč-ja-r~…ĺi a tad…ômaw "*.*%"ju-taj a tad…ômaw "*.*%", tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i a tad…ômaw "*.*%", ¶oŇč-kow aa tad…ômaw "*.*%" atu t…ô-kow a tad…ômaw "*.*%". pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja a k…ôzaj atu aŇčaŇčaan nu kusi. *** a nińß ¶aan, kanatar~…ĺ a nisaŇča Ē~ °an pur~…ĺunŇč nu a ¶a ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja ńßami nu kanatar~…ĺ **.* %, kusi a nisaŇča Ē~ °an ma ¶ar~…ĺap ku ńßamin nu kanati tu s…ôpat a ńßunt u ¶a ¶aj. u tad…ômaw ńßamin nu kannatar~…ĺ *% dada Ē~ ° ku nika ¶ar~…ĺap. r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja iza ku tur~…ĺu ńßunt u ¶a ¶aj ku niar~…ĺa tu sata makajzaaj i pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô nu binawr~…ĺanaj atu kapur~…ĺuŇč a kusi. . **** a nińß ¶aan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ miasip tu mi ¶akajaj, pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a tad…ômaw par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kanata a nisaŇča Ē~ °an pur~…ĺuŇč nu a ¶a **,*** ku ow a kar~…ĺisiw, mańßiza nu ow- ¶ow par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶a tu kakatukuńß **.*%, nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja par~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad tu kakatukuńß pikakaan tu tusa. i kar~…ĺar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad kasat…ôz…ôp tu **** a mińß ¶aan tu zikuz, pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô i ¶…ôr~…ĺaŇč ku nika ¶akat nu k…ôzaj, sakauzip a nisaŇča Ē~ °an kar~…ĺamkam sa mar~…ĺańßad, saa ¶a jadańß ku nipatizaŇč tu pi ¶akajan, r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° atu tar~…ĺakawaj a satuŇčduńß nu r~…ĺama Ē~ ° a pikawawan. *****, == mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan ==
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Pu-cya-le-s-te "Low-ma-ni-ya a kamu Bucure»ôti, Low-ma-ni-ya pangiha a kamu (buku're Ét ≤) )nu Low-ma ni-ya a angangan a tukay, u satabakiay a tukay nu Low-ma ni-ya aca, cen-ce, keyzay angangan nu lalangawan, tini i Low-ma-ni-ya sawali nutimulan, Wa-la-ci-ya enal nu teban, Tu-naw-he saciliw a sa'wac Ten-pow-wi-ca a sa'wac. singangan tu "adidi'ay a Pa-li". ahebal nu hekal 228 kalalecad kung-li, macapi tu 200 emang ku tademaw. anu tademaw ku asipen, Pu-cya-le-s-te nu Ow-mung nu sakaenem nu tabakiay a tukay. :Bucure»ôti,ÁĺÖť¶¨ŚįľšļěŤ™ěÁôľťü≥:(buku're Ét ≤) ) . likisiś≠∑ŚŹ≤ Pu-cya-le-s-te iza 500 tatu a mihcaan ku naemekan. 1459 a mihcaan Pu-cya-le-s-te mala angangan nu Low-ma-ni-ya, 1574 a mihcaan malahad mala angangan nu tukay, 1659 a mihcaan malingatu mala angangan tu nu Wa-la-ci-ya a kanatal. 1862 a mihcaan mala pulung nu Low-ma-ni-ya binawlad pulunngan a kanatal.1877 a mihca 5 a bulad 9 a demiad Low-ma-ni-ya musakamu misateked. 1947 a mihcaan Low-ma-ni-ya binawlad nu kapulungan a kanatal angangan nu tukay. 1960 a mihcaan, syakay anizateng nu kanatal a kung-can-tang atu kuli a sakaput palacapu tu Pu-cya-le-s-te a matatengil. 1977 a mihcaan maninel. 1989 a mihcaan masasuayaw, mala nu baluhay angangan a tukay nu Low-ma-ni-ya. zikuz, malahad tu ku keyzay, mala tungusay nu tukay nu Low-ma-ni-ya. uyni tukay a kakenis mala enem a kitizaan, patizeng tu cacay kinciw, kasa kitizaan cacay ku kinciw, u binawlan ku misingkiway. Pu-cya-le-s-te tusa ku singannganay nu mitukuday tu mali a sakaput- Pu-cya-le-s-te-Ti-na-muw atu Pu-cya-le-s-te-sin a sakaput. tini i Pu-cya-le-s-te a Low-ma-ni-ya nu binawlanay kung-haw kitakt nu saka tusa satabakiay a nisanga'an. duduc 2002 za mihcaan tu nikinsaay tu tademaw, Pu-cya-le-s-te iza ku 1,926334 ku tademaw, macalap ku labuay nu Low-ma-ni-ya a tademaw 8.9% . katuud ku i Pu-cya-le-s-te mikawaway a tademaw muneng i Pu-cya-le-s-te micapi tu tukay "angangan i I-al-bu-a kuwan", nika caay ka ilabuen miasip ku tademaw nuheni. Pu-cya-le-s-te a tademaw micaliway tu tusa a kadadawa nu kacunusay a ziday. saayaway I 19 a se-ci tu sazikuzay a mihcaan katukuh tu sakatusa nu kitakit a nganganyaw. sakatusa i Ci-aw-say-s-ku a ziday "1965-1989", kilul tu kacakat nu tukay, katuud ku malukay nu niyazu' mabulaw tayza i tukay. namahini, i Ci-aw-say-s-ku la'tus amipatay tu nisabilian atu sapipatut sibili a sapayu, pakiniza han talakaw ku nikacunus. Pu-cya-le-s-te a tademawan, 96.9% sa nu Low-ma-ni-ya a tademaw. sakatusa binacadan a tademaw sa u Low-mu a tademaw, macalap ku 1.4% nu tademaw. zuma a binacadan izaw ku Swng-ya-li a tademaw "0.3%"Yu-tay a tademaw "0.1%", Tu-al-ci a tademaw "0.1%", Cong-kow aa tademaw "0.1%" atu Te-kow a tademaw "0.1%". Pu-cya-le-s-te nu Low-ma-ni-ya a kezay atu angangaan nu kusi. 210 a nihcaan, kanatal a nisanga'an pulunng nu aca macalap ku Low-ma-ni-ya hami nu kanatal 22.7 %, kusi a nisanga'an macalap ku hamin nu kanati tu sepat a hunt u cacay. u tademaw hamin nu kannatal 9% dada' ku nikacalap. Low-ma-ni-ya iza ku tulu hunt u cacay ku niala tu sata makayzaay i Pu-cya-le-s-te nu binawlanay atu kapulung a kusi. . 2007 a nihcaan, kilul miasip tu micakayay, Pu-cya-le-s-te a tademaw palalecad Kanata a nisanga'an pulung nu aca 20,057 ku Ow a kalisiw, mahiza nu Ow-cow palaleca tu kakatukuh 92.2%, nu Low-ma-ni-ya palalecad tu kakatukuh pikakaan tu tusa. i kalalecad kasatezep tu 1990 a mihcaan tu zikuz, Pu-cya-le-s-te icelang ku nikacakat nu kezay, sakauzip a nisanga'an kalamkam sa malahad, saaca yadah ku nipatizang tu picakayan, luma' atu talakaway a satungduh nu lama' a pikawawan. 2007ŚĻī, == malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan ==

ku i pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô mikawawaj a tad…ômaw mun…ôŇč i pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô mi ¶api tu tukaj "aŇčaŇčan i i-ar~…ĺ-bu-a kuwan", nika ¶aaj ka ir~…ĺabu…ôn miasip ku tad…ômaw nuńß…ôni. pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a tad…ômaw mi ¶ar~…ĺiwaj tu tusa a kadadawa nu ka ¶unusaj a zidaj. saajawaj i ** a s…ô- ¶i tu sazikuzaj a mińß ¶aan katukuńß tu sakatusa nu kitakit a ŇčaŇčanjaw. sakatusa i ¶i-aw-saj-s-ku a zidaj "****-****", kir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ka ¶akat nu tukaj, katuud ku mar~…ĺukaj nu nijazu Ē~ ° mabur~…ĺaw tajza i tukaj. namańßini, i ¶i-aw-saj-s-ku r~…ĺa Ē~ °tus amipataj tu nisabir~…ĺian atu sapipatut sibir~…ĺi a sapaju, pakiniza ńßan tar~…ĺakaw ku nika ¶unus. pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a tad…ômawan, **.*% sa nu r~…ĺow-ma-ni-ja a tad…ômaw. sakatusa bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw sa u r~…ĺow-mu a ńßunt u ¶a ¶aj ku niar~…ĺa tu sata makajzaaj i pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô nu binawr~…ĺanaj atu kapur~…ĺuŇč a kusi. . **** a nińß ¶aan, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ miasip tu mi ¶akajaj, pu- ¶ja-r~…ĺ…ô-s-t…ô a tad…ômaw
